creator: pch-freebsd-bugs-1@u-1.phicoh.com
text:
Version 4.16.g20200221 of drm-fbsd12.0-kmod fails on 12.2-BETA1

I have kld_list="/boot/modules/i915kms.ko" in /etc/rc.conf. 

I see in dmesg:
drmn0: <drmn> on vgapci0
device_attach: drmn0 attach returned 19

This is a Thinkpad T430s. The CPU is i5-3320M

Note that it works fine in 12.1
